mapper.select: SELECT * FROM crm_contact WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND is_primary = 1 AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: c.status = 1 AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(c.name, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.position, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.phone, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.email, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.wechat, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(c.notes, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) OR LOWER(COALESCE(cu.company_name, '')) LIKE LOWER(#{pattern}) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_contact c LEFT JOIN crm_customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id WHERE

SELECT 'contact' AS type, c.contact_id AS record_id, c.name AS title, CONCAT_WS(' · ', NULLIF(cu.company_name, ''), NULLIF(c.position, ''), NULLIF(c.phone, '')) AS subtitle, CONCAT_WS(' · ', NULLIF(c.email, ''), NULLIF(c.notes, '')) AS content, c.customer_id, c.contact_id, COALESCE(c.last_contact_time, c.create_time) AS event_time, c.create_time, c.update_time FROM crm_contact c LEFT JOIN crm_customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id WHERE ORDER BY COALESCE(c.last_contact_time, c.create_time) DESC NULLS LAST, c.contact_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
